TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Torraye_Braggs, title = Torraye_Braggs, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Torraye_Braggs} }

S.FORM: Torraye Braggs sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1976, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 5, Torraye Braggs, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Torraye Braggs sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1976, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 5, Torraye Braggs, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: torraje βraɣɣs~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, torraje βraɣɣs~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
